title: stelis tyria
intro: Stelis tyria, also known as the "Yellow Stelis", is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis tyria include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
